info.title: Aspose.Imaging Image Resize Micro Application for .NET
info.description: Aspose.Imaging Image Resize Micro Application allows you to process image resize via the command line or add an image resize feature to your .NET application.

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add reference to the MicroApps aPI to your project.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to the project project for the addition of the reference
to the MicroApps API.

options.name: --input
options.description: Required. Input images paths or url.

options.name: --output
options.description: Required. Path to the resized image.

options.name: --format
options.description:
(Default: jpg) Output image format. Jpeg is default
value

options.name: --width-on-resize
options.description: Width of the resulting image in pixels.

options.name: --height-on-resize
options.description: Height of the resulting image in pixels.

options.name: --resize-algorithm
options.description:
(Default: HighQualityResample) Resize type. Allowed
values : as per
https://reference.aspose.com/imaging/net/aspose.ima
ging/resizetype enumeration. Default value is
HighQualityResample.

options.name: --background-color
options.description:
(Default: White) The background color of resulting
image. Could be set in using
ging/color/. Otherwise HTML HEX code expressions
are supported (#RRGGBB, #RGB, #RRGGBBAA, #RGBA), as
well as special color - transparent.

options.name: --keep-aspect-ratio
options.description: (Default: true) Keep aspect ratio on resize
